name: tendergraph
description: Agentic tender operations and evidence-backed analysis with GPT-5.6 and code-owned authority gates

interface.shortDescription: Operate and audit tenders with governed GPT-5.6
interface.longDescription: Coordinates opportunity selection, qualification, requirements, bid planning, amendment impact, and human-only submission while retaining an evidence-backed GPT-5.6 audit workflow.
defaultPrompt: Run the complete TenderGraph operational lifecycle and explain every authority gate.
Audit the Chile public evaluation and publish its trace.
Explain who was recommended for award and why, with evidence.
